prompt: Echo a caller-provided model-call id through an MLX-compatible response and normalize provider errors into the contract shape. Do not include a finished patch in the prompt.
expected_evidence: Response metadata includes the caller-provided model-call id.
Provider errors normalize to portable error kind, message, and retryability fields.
No API keys or secrets are written to records.
contamination_notes: Synthetic dirty-dozen harness task; contains no customer data, benchmark answer, or patch solution.
